phase.name: Local AI portability and daily-use integration

model_runtime.message: Phase 6 is in progress through IMP-057. Offline session import, explicit text-only loopback Ollama capture, and the deterministic end-to-end local-portability harness are implemented. PORT-001, PORT-003, and bounded PORT-013 are ci-pass; the exact-commit primary Intel Mac evidence remains pending in Issue #178. PORT-015 and the Phase 6 gate are not complete.
